---
title: "Descriptives"
description: "Sample and variable descriptives" 

format:
  html:
    theme: paper
    shift-heading-level-by: 1
    code-tools: true
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
    toc-fold: false
    toc-location: right
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contents"

# Portability settings
embed-resources: true

# Execution options 
execute:
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
# set error messages to English
Sys.setenv(LANG = "en")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.align = "center", 
  fig.retina = 3,
  fig.width = 6, 
  fig.height = (6 * 0.618),
  out.width = "90%", 
  collapse = FALSE
)

options(
  digits = 4,
  width = 300,
  dplyr.summarise.inform = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| include: false
#| warning: true
#| message: true
if (!require("groundhog", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("groundhog")
}
library("groundhog")

# use groundhog to install and load packages
pkgs <- c("here",         # System path management
          "tidyverse",    # ggplot, dplyr, and friends
          "tinytable",    # Minimalist tables
          "rstatix",      # Basic tidy statistical tests 
          "modelsummary", # Data and model summaries with tables and plots
          "marginaleffects", # Model-based predictions, comparisons, and more marginalia
          "ggdist",       # Additional plot elements
          "ggrain",       # For fancy raincloud plots
          "GGally",       # ggpairs and other ggplot2 friends
          "ggsignif",     # Add significance to figures
          "patchwork",    # Combine multiple ggplots
          "showtext"      # Additional fonts for plots etc
          )

groundhog.library(pkgs, "2026-01-01")
```

```{r}
#| include: false

showtext_auto()
# showtext_opts(dpi = 600)

font_add_google("Public Sans", "Public Sans")
font_add_google("Public Sans", "Public Sans Light", regular.wt = 300)
font_add_google("Public Sans", "Public Sans Semibold", regular.wt = 600)

# Custom ggplot theme
theme_nice <- function() {
  # General text family and base size
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Public Sans", base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      # Remove minor grid lines for cleaner look
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      # Customize major grid lines color
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      # Plot title: bold and custom relative size
      plot.title = element_text(family = "Public Sans", face = "bold", size = rel(1.1), margin = margin(b = 10)),
      # Subtitle and caption: lighter weight 
      plot.subtitle = element_text(family = "Public Sans Light", face = "plain"),
      plot.caption = element_text(family = "Public Sans Light", face = "plain"),
      # Axis text: Relative size
      axis.text = element_text(size = rel(0.9)),
      # Axis titles: Semibold and custom relative size
      axis.title = element_text(family = "Public Sans Semibold", size = rel(0.9)),
      axis.title.x = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title.y = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      # Axis lines
      axis.line = element_line(color = "grey25", linewidth = 0.8),
      # Facet labels: bold text on grey background
      strip.text = element_text(
        family = "Public Sans Semibold", face = "plain",
        size = rel(1),
        hjust = 0.5
      ),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "grey25", linewidth = 0.8), 
      # Legend styling: compact and top-positioned
      legend.title = element_text(family = "Public Sans Semibold", size = rel(0.8)),
      legend.text = element_text(size = rel(0.8)),
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.justification = "center",
      legend.title.position = "left",
      legend.margin = margin(l = 0, t = 0)
    )
}

theme_set(theme_nice())
update_geom_defaults("text", list(family = "Public Sans"))
update_geom_defaults("label", list(family = "Public Sans"))
```

```{r}
#| include: false
data_dir <- here("01_data")
table_dir <- here("02_output", "tables", "descriptives")
figure_dir <- here("02_output", "figures", "descriptives")

dir.create(table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = TRUE)
dir.create(figure_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = TRUE)
```

```{r}
load(here(data_dir, "analysis", "df_wide.RData"))
df <- df_wide 
rm(df_wide)
```

## Metadata

#### Fieldwork dates

```{r}
df |> 
  summarise("Start Date" = min(date),
            "End Date" = max(date)) |> 
  tt()
```

```{r}
df |> 
  count(month = lubridate::floor_date(date, "month")) |> 
  mutate(percent = n / sum(n)) |> 
  tt()
```

#### Duration

```{r}
df |>
  mutate(`Survey duration` = duration / 60,
         `News duration` = exp_treatment_time / 60,
         `Information duration` = exp_polinfo_time) |> 
  select(`Survey duration`, `News duration`, `Information duration`) |>
  datasummary_skim()
```

#### Attention 

Final post-treatment attention check.

```{r}
df |> 
  summarise(passed_num = sum(exp_attention == "Costs of living"),
            passed_per = sum(exp_attention == "Costs of living") / nrow(df) * 100,
            failed_num = sum(exp_attention != "Costs of living"),
            failed_per = sum(exp_attention != "Costs of living") / nrow(df) * 100) |> 
  tt()
```

## Socio-demographic distributions

```{r}
descriptive_table <- df |>  
  select(
    Age = age_group,
    Gender = gender,
    Region = region,
    Urbanicity = urbanicity,
    `Education Level` = education_level,
    `Migration Background` = migration_background,
    `Living Standard` = living_standard,
  ) |> 
  datasummary_skim(type = "categorical") |> 
  style_tt(j = 1, align = "l") |> 
  style_tt(j = 2:3, align = "c")

descriptive_table |> 
  save_tt(here(table_dir, "sample_descriptives.docx"), overwrite = T)

descriptive_table
```

```{r}
descriptive_exp_table <- df |>  
  select(
    Condition = exp_condition, 
    Age = age_group,
    Gender = gender,
    Region = region,
    Urbanicity = urbanicity,
    `Education Level` = education_level,
    `Migration Background` = migration_background,
    `Living Standard` = living_standard,
  ) |> 
  droplevels() |> 
  datasummary_balance(~Condition, data = _) |> 
  style_tt(j = 1, align = "l") |> 
  style_tt(j = 2:3, align = "c")

descriptive_exp_table |> 
  save_tt(here(table_dir, "by_condition_sample_descriptives.docx"), overwrite = T)

descriptive_exp_table
```

#### Age

```{r}
age_table <- df |>  
  select(Age = age) |> 
  datasummary_skim(type = "numeric") |> 
  style_tt(j = 1, align = "l") |> 
  style_tt(j = 2:3, align = "c")

age_table |> 
  save_tt(here(table_dir, "age_descriptives.docx"), overwrite = T)

age_table
```

```{r}
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 6
#| fig-dpi: 600
#| fig-showtext: true
df |>
  count(age) |>
  mutate(percent = n / sum(n) * 100) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = age, y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "slateblue4", alpha = 0.6, color = "grey20", width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(percent, 1), "%")), 
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5, color = "grey25") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(df$age, na.rm = TRUE), 
             linetype = "dashed", color = "grey25", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 16:26) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 400, by = 100), limits = c(0, 400)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = NULL, title = "Age Distribution") +
  theme_nice() 

ggsave(here(figure_dir, "age_distribution.svg"),
       height = 4,
       width = 6,
       dpi = 600)
```

#### Correlations between key variables

```{r}
# Helper function to create correlogram
scatter_function_grouped <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 1) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", 
                se = TRUE, 
                linewidth = 1.2, 
                alpha = 0.5, 
                na.rm = TRUE)
}
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-height: 12
#| fig-width: 16
#| fig-showtext: TRUE
df |> 
  mutate(age_group = as.character(age_group)) |> 
  mutate(age_group = case_match(age_group,
    "16-21 years" ~ "16-21",
    "22-26 years" ~ "22-26"
  )) |> 
  select(
    age_group,
    age,
    polpart = polpart_pomp,
    dem_pre = dem_pomp,
    aut_pre = aut_pomp,
    aot_pre = aot_pomp,
    cr_pre = cognitive_reappraisal_pomp,
    es_pre = expressive_suppression_pomp,
    exp_dem = exp_dem_pomp,
    exp_polpart = exp_polpart_pomp
  ) |> 
  ggpairs(
    data = _,
    columns = 2:10,  
    mapping = aes(color = age_group),
    lower = list(continuous = scatter_function_grouped),
    upper = list(continuous = wrap("cor", stars = TRUE, size = 4)),  
    diag = list(continuous = wrap("densityDiag", alpha = 0.5)),
    legend = 1,
    progress = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("16-21" = "#1b9e77",
                                "22-26" = "#d95f02")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("16-21" = "#1b9e77",
                                "22-26" = "#d95f02")) +
  theme_nice() +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16)) + 
  labs(color = "age_group", fill = "age_group")

ggsave(here(figure_dir, "pre_var_correlogram.svg"),
       height = 12,
       width = 16,
       dpi = 600)
```

## Experiment Checks

#### Treatment assignment

```{r}
df |> 
  count(exp_condition) |> 
  tt()
```

```{r}
df |> 
  group_by(age_group) |> 
  count(exp_condition) |> 
  tt()
```

#### Survey outcomes

```{r}
df |> 
  select(Treatment = exp_condition,
         Age = age_group,
         exp_dem_pomp, 
         exp_polpart_pomp) |> 
  datasummary_balance(~Treatment,
                      by = "Age",
                      data = _)
```

```{r}
df |> 
  select(Treatment = exp_condition,
         Age = age_group,
         exp_dem_pomp, 
         exp_polpart_pomp) |> 
  datasummary(Age * (exp_dem_pomp + exp_polpart_pomp) ~ 
                Treatment * (Mean + SD),
              data = _,
              fmt = 1)
```

```{r}
dem_exp_fig <- df |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = exp_condition, y = exp_dem_pomp, fill = exp_condition, color = exp_condition)) +
  geom_rain(
    rain.side = "r",  
    seed = 42,
    point.args = list(alpha = 0.2, size = 0.8),  
    boxplot.args = list(
      outlier.shape = NA,
      alpha = 0.7,
      color = "black"  
    ),
    violin.args = list(alpha = 0.7)
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    aes(x = exp_condition, y = exp_dem_pomp),  
    comparisons = list(
      c("anxiety", "hope"), 
      c("anxiety", "control"), 
      c("hope", "control")
    ),
    map_signif_level = TRUE,
    size = 0.8,
    textsize = 4,
    family = "Public Sans",
    color = "black",
    tip_length = 0,
    step_increase = 0.12,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.15))) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Democratic Support",
    title = "Democratic Support by Experimental Condition"
  ) +
  theme_nice() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

dem_exp_fig
```

```{r}
polpart_exp_fig <- df |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = exp_condition, y = exp_polpart_pomp, fill = exp_condition, color = exp_condition)) +
  geom_rain(
    rain.side = "r",  
    seed = 42,
    point.args = list(alpha = 0.2, size = 0.8),  
    boxplot.args = list(
      outlier.shape = NA,
      alpha = 0.7,
      color = "black"  
    ),
    violin.args = list(alpha = 0.7)
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    aes(x = exp_condition, y = exp_polpart_pomp),  
    comparisons = list(
      c("anxiety", "hope"), 
      c("anxiety", "control"), 
      c("hope", "control")
    ),
    map_signif_level = TRUE,
    size = 0.8,
    textsize = 4,
    family = "Public Sans",
    color = "black",
    tip_length = 0,
    step_increase = 0.12,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2", direction = -1) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2", direction = -1) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.15))) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Political Participation",
    title = "Political Participation by Experimental Condition"
  ) +
  theme_nice() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") 

polpart_exp_fig 
```
